text: Entity Overview: Thermilate Middle East ● Full Name: Thermilate Middle East Trading LLC ● Affiliation: Associate of Thermilate Technologies, United Kingdom. ● Role: Manufacturer, supplier, and contractor specializing in energy-saving, waterproofing, and fire protection coatings. ● Location: Dubai, UAE (P.O. Box 234195). ● Key Metrics: 25+ years of experience, 5000+ successful projects, 2500+ satisfied clients, 100+ dealers. Core Product Catalog The following products are specifically categorized for the Middle East region: Product Name Category Primary Function/Description Leakguard / Leakguard Waterproofing Liquid-applied waterproofing membrane for Standard various surfaces. E-coat Energy Saving Energy-efficient coating system. Thermilate Roofcoat Thermal Insulates and waterproofs; designed for high heat environments like Dubai. Vitrocoat Specialized Additive for painting and coating all types of glass. Rust Bullet Protective Rust arrestor and protective coating for metal. Butyl Tape / T 103 Butyl Sealant High-adhesion sealing for joints and gaps. Sealant T104 PU Sealant Sealant Polyurethane-based sealant for construction joints. Reinforcement Mesh Support Used in conjunction with liquid membranes for added strength. Thermilate Primer Preparation Base coat for enhancing adhesion of finish coatings. Service Offerings Thermilate provides turnkey application services in addition to product supply: 1. Waterproofing Solutions: ○ Metal Roof Waterproofing: A specialized six-layer system designed for industrial/commercial metal roofs. ○ Liquid Applied Waterproofing: Water-based polyurethane acrylic systems for roofs and wet areas. ○ Warehouse Waterproofing: Large-scale protection for industrial storage facilities. ○ Solar Panel Roof Waterproofing: Specialized treatment for roofs hosting solar infrastructure. 2. Thermal & Energy Efficiency: ○ Heat Reflective Coating: Ceramic-based coatings with a high Solar Reflective Index (SRI) to reduce cooling costs. 3. Fire Protection (DCD Approved): ○ Intumescent Coatings: Fire-resistant paints that expand when exposed to heat to protect structural steel. ○ Fire Retardant Coating: Coatings that reduce the spread of flame on surfaces. ○ Fire Stop Installation: Penetration sealing to maintain fire compartments. 4. Maintenance & Specialized Coatings: ○ Back Painted Glass: Aesthetic and functional glass coating services. ○ Rust Arrestor Coating: Treatment for corroded metal surfaces to prevent further degradation. ○ General Roof Maintenance: Routine inspection and repair services. Compliance & Certifications ● ISO Certifications: ISO 9001 (Quality Management) and ISO 45001 (Occupational Health and Safety). ● Local Approvals: Dubai Civil Defense (DCD) approved contractor for Fire Retardant and Intumescent paint applications. ● Sustainability: Focus on "Energy Saving Innovators" and sustainable, eco-friendly product formulations. Contact & Metadata for RAG Context ● Region: United Arab Emirates (Dubai) and Oman. ● HQ Address: Thermilate Middle East Trading LLC, Dubai, UAE. ● Phone: +971 4 2511 390 ● Email: tmedub@eim.ae ● Website: https://thermilate.ae/ ● Content Freshness: Data reflects operations and project history as of early 2025.
